title: Talking about drugs and alcohol - Canada.ca
content:
## Talking about drugs and alcohol
How to talk to your loved ones and health care provider about drugs and alcohol

## Services and information

### How to talk to a family member or friend about their drug or alcohol use
Signs of higher-risk drug and alcohol use, how to talk to someone about their drug and alcohol use, and how to get help

### Talking with teenagers about drugs and alcohol
Why teens use drugs and alcohol, tips for talking to teens, and information for parents

### Talking to your health care provider about opioids
Opioid medications, risks, and things to talk about with your health care provider
